full_text:
Meng Yan 孟琰
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Meng Yan (孟琰)was born in Zhuti Commandery, Yizhou. Appointed by as a local leader by Zhuge Liang after his Southern Campaign. Meng Yan was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
